We can basically just use that for you.
And then again, you know, our team is, I mean, you know, keep this candid for now, but like our team is working on something that would provide that in our own ecosystem as well.
Understood.
Understood.
Okay, cool.
And you're seven, how many employees are you guys?
Oh, good questions.
Let me see.
So I did check.
We've got quite a bit, right?
Yeah, we have been around for about a year and we're at like a 14 million like ARR run rate right now.
We've got...
80 employees on LinkedIn, got them in like 20 different countries, but the majority is in the United States, 34 in the United States.
And I checked our client workspaces.
We've got 71 active client workspaces.
Got it.
Got it.
Okay.
Awesome.
Well, I'll share all these follow-up resources, a couple examples, and a link to my calendar so that we can do I don't usually dress up like this, by the way.
This is, we were doing a Halloween office.
I, to be honest with you, my thought was just like, man, she's got some style.
But I, that makes sense.
Yeah, the peace sign.
didn't, I didn't notice the peace sign until now, but yeah, happy Halloween.
We're a day away.
True, true, true.
All right, Tyler, good talking to you.
Nice to meet Likewise.
Nice to meet you.
Talk soon.
Bye.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX's AI-driven content services for VisitorsCoverage.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Challenge:** VisitorsCoverage (VC) needs a strategy for AI search (AEO) to capture long-tail queries, but fears hurting its established SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**The Solution:** GrowthX offers an end-to-end service combining AI workflows with expert oversight, starting with a "Strategy Sprint" to build a custom knowledge base.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [**The Model:** A two-phase engagement: an 8-week Strategy Sprint (Phase 1) to validate quality, followed by a 12-month commitment (Phase 2) for daily publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
  - [**The Next Step:** VC will schedule a follow-up demo to see GrowthX's platform and workflows in action.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2093.0)

## Topics

### VisitorsCoverage's Challenge: Adapting to AI Search

  - [VC is a 20-year-old travel insurance marketplace (VisitorsCoverage.com) with a SaaS platform (Trappy.io).](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [**Primary Goal:** Develop an AEO strategy to capture long-tail queries in AI answers.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Key Constraint:** Avoid harming established SEO performance, which is critical for the business.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [**Current Tools:** Using SEMrush, Ahrefs, and other tools, but feels "tired of trying" to find a clear path forward.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### GrowthX's Solution: AI-Powered Content Engine

  - [GrowthX is an end-to-end partner that scales quality content using AI workflows and expert oversight.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [**Founder:** Marcel, a former CMO (HashiCorp, Scale), built the platform to automate his organic growth process.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [**Expertise:** The Chief Content Officer is the former editor-in-chief of TechCrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [**Content Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - [**Editorial:** Net new content and refreshes (target: 5 articles/week).](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
      - [**Programmatic SEO:** Scalable pages (e.g., city guides, comparison pages, glossaries).](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
      - [**Interactive Tools:** Case-by-case development (e.g., per diem calculators).](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)

### Engagement Model & Team Structure

  - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint (8 weeks)**](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build a custom knowledge base via expert interviews to train AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
      - [**Deliverable:** A content roadmap and initial articles for quality validation.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
      - [**Opt-Out:** VC can exit before Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Cadence of Growth (12 months)**](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
      - [**Commitment:** 12-month term, required to justify the significant resource investment in Phase 1.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
      - [**Team:** A dedicated 3-person team: Managing Director (strategy), Managing Editor (deliverables), and Content Manager (execution).](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Client Review:** VC's only task is providing timely feedback to prevent bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [**Performance:** \~95% of clients convert from Phase 1 to Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Email VC team with case studies, resources, and a calendar link for a follow-up demo.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2178.0)
  - [**VC Team:** Schedule the follow-up demo to see GrowthX's platform and workflows in action.](https://fathom.video/share/6VybcVkpWQsGEU7LuJMx9nHL7t5rnqvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2093.0)

action_items.description: Email Shagorika/Michael/Rajeev: process write-up, gap analysis/timeline, case studies, calendar link
